issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks in the pre-referral, post-referral, and other workflows simultaneously. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any Loan Simple leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of being unenrolled. The workflow filters did not include Closed Lost and Transferred deal stages as suppression criteria. A tweak was made to the filters to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals already marked as Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to a prior stage, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger to collect closing info. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the workflow to add it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous loan officer's information instead of the updated one. The issue was identified as a product-side problem and was resolved by Luis. The specific root cause was not stated.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated loan officer information.

issues.title: MRC deals not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks upon Offer Accepted
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment in the TC workflow, leaving transaction coordinators without tasks to collect closing information. HubSpot support was engaged and identified a fix. The specific root cause was not publicly disclosed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
